title: DSDS Dated Note Leaf Definitions
description: Shared leaf definitions for date-stamped metadata: an ISO 8601 date and a plain-text note. Composed by the `lastUpdated` and `lastReviewed` metadata fields so their date and note rules live in one place. These are leaves, not a full object shape — each composing field keeps its own closed object with its own extra properties.

plainNote.description: A plain-text note. MUST NOT contain markup and MUST NOT be empty.
